title: CHOICES COUNSELING CENTER - 211info
text: CHOICES COUNSELING CENTER CHOICES COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides substance use disorder assessment, treatment, and education. Also includes support services such as group counseling, individual counseling and case management as well as gender specific services. 205 Fruitdale Drive Grants Pass, OR 97527 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:45pm, Saturday 9am-2pm (541) 479-8847 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 479-8847 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP and discounted and sliding-scale fees are available. Accepts private insurance on a case-by-case basis. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees AREA SERVED: Josephine County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-4:45pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Case/Care Management * Substance Use Disorder Issues Relapse Prevention Programs Substance Use Disorder Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
